content:
Startup scripts, Docker Compose, and CI jobs are full of sleep 30 and fingers crossed. Sometimes the database needs 5 seconds. Sometimes 90. Hard-coded sleeps are either flaky or slow.

waitup polls until the thing is actually ready.

pip install git+https://github.com/SybilGambleyyu/waitup.git
waitup http://localhost:3000
waitup db:5432 redis:6379 -t 90
waitup http://api:8000/healthz --expect 200
waitup 'cmd:pg_isready -h db'

Enter fullscreen mode

Exit fullscreen mode

Compose-friendly

waitup http://web:8000/healthz db:5432 -t 120 && ./migrate.sh

Enter fullscreen mode

Exit fullscreen mode

Zero dependencies. Exit 0 when ready, 1 on timeout.

Source: github.com/SybilGambleyyu/waitup.

Canonical post: https://sybilgambleyyu.github.io/posts/waitup/
